prompt: Use regional-industry-policy-miner to scan 渭南. Identify the industries the local government is really betting on, separate policy bet / local carrying / commercial loop, and recommend the Mode A follow-up order.
expected_signals: Produces a ranked candidate table rather than a flat industry list.
Separates new-energy power/equipment, equipment/additive manufacturing, new materials/modern chemicals, and specialty agriculture instead of merging them into generic labels.
Includes representative enterprises or project subjects for top industries when evidence is available.
States should_enter_mode_a or an equivalent follow-up order.

prompt: Use regional-industry-policy-miner to analyze 西安 + 光子产业. Keep the policy source library, support timeline, resource flow, enterprise mapping, quantitative layer, risks, and evidence gaps. Do not make the new version thinner than prior evidence.
expected_signals: Uses Mode A rather than a generic regional scan.
Includes support timeline, resource flow, local advantage, cluster portrait, enterprise mapping, and quantitative layer.
Separates policy support from commercial-quality pre-check.
Preserves prior evidence density when iterating.

prompt: Use regional-industry-policy-miner to judge whether 莲湖区's highlighted industries have a real commercial loop or are mainly government-forced cultivation. Keep the top decision table readable in Chinese Markdown.
expected_signals: Uses compact Chinese headers such as 排名 / 候选产业 / 政策押注 / 本地承载 / 商业闭环 / 是否深挖.
Explains long rationale outside the table instead of stuffing table cells.
Frames commercial quality as 商业闭环 vs 政府强推, not a full investment rating.
Keeps policy bet strength, local carrying strength, and commercial-quality pre-check separate.
